name: agentforge
description: AgentForge: The Minimalist Framework for Collaborative AI Agents
author: Agentic Engineering <hello@agenticengineering.agency>

scripts.test:e2e: cd tests/e2e && npx vitest run --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:local: cd tests/e2e && npx vitest run local.test.ts tools.test.ts --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:cloud: cd tests/e2e && npx vitest run deploy.test.ts cloud-execution.test.ts threads.test.ts --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:coverage: cd tests/e2e && npx vitest run --config vitest.config.ts --coverage
